questionHtml:
Which complex ion contains a central ion with an oxidation state of +3?


A.  [PtCl6]2−

B.  [Cu(H2O)4(OH)2]

C.  [Ni(NH3)4(H2O)2]2+

D.  [Co(NH3)4Cl2]+
